Mad Money (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,668,843Details
International Box Office $4,375,214
Worldwide Box Office $25,044,057
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $15,179,758
Total $15,179,758
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,736,452 (37.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.67 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:82.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$22,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,470 opening theaters/2,470 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $34,428,881

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 18th, 2008 (Wide) by Overture Films
Video Release: May 13th, 2008 by Anchor Bay Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual material and language, and brief drug references
Running Time: 104 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Fired, Heist, Money Troubles, Non-Chronological
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Overture Films, Millennium Films, Lightspeed Media Productions, Big City Pictures, Granada Productions, MMoney, Grand Army Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
